active.name: Glacial Spike
active.rawText: Deals 25 (+120% Magic) damage and Chills the target, reducing Attack Speed by 20% for 3 turns.

passives.name: Frozen Ground
passives.rawText: Enemies that enter combat Chilled take 10 (+40% Magic) bonus damage.

passives.name: Winter's Patience
passives.rawText: Gain 1 (+2% Magic) Shield for each Chilled enemy at the start of every turn.

passives.name: Cold Reserve
passives.rawText: While benched, reduce the mana cost of the first ally active ability by 10.
